etg_c.name: eTG-change Regenerative Stimulant [eTG-c]
etg_c.desc:
A powerful regenerative process promoter. Used for rapid recovery of wounded personnel after injury or during transport of severely wounded casualties. Only to be used by qualified physicians and medical personnel. Labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Restores 2 muscle health per limb per second, blood volume recovers 50ml/s, for 60 seconds.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: After effect ends, continuously drains hunger and hydration for 20 seconds and causes severe chest pain.</color>
zagustin.name: Zagustin Hemostatic [Zagustin]
zagustin.desc:
Coagulant hemostatic drug, a thrombin-based hemostatic agent. Used to stop all types of internal and external bleeding, including massive hemorrhage.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Immediately stops all bleeding and prevents new bleeding for 180 seconds.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Significantly increases blood viscosity, -0.3 hydration per second for 2 minutes.</color>
cu_morphine.name: Morphine Syringe [Morphine]
cu_morphine.desc:
A potent opioid painkiller. Rapidly eliminates pain and tremors after injection, but you've never seen morphine packaged like this before. Maybe better not to use it.

<color=#ff6666>Effect: Extreme opioid drug influence, will be fatal!</color>
sj12.name: SJ12 TGLabs Combat Stimulant [SJ12]
sj12.desc:
TGLabs combat stimulant. Uses a special formula to lower body temperature for enhanced perception and resilience, while continuously replenishing energy and hydration.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +0.2 hunger and hydration per second, +2 resilience level, for 10 minutes.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Immediate -4°C body temp, -2kg weight; after 10 min +4°C body temp for 2 minutes.</color>
mule.name: M.U.L.E. Stimulant [M.U.L.E.]
mule.desc:
Military load-bearing enhancement stimulant. Significantly boosts carrying capacity by stimulating muscle fibers and the nervous system, ideal for extracting with large amounts of loot. Marked with M.U.L.E. insignia. A large yellow exclamation mark followed by numerous side effects. TerraGroup Labs.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Activates after 1 sec, lasts 40 minutes, carry weight +15U (stacks with other stims).</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: +10 sickness; -0.2 muscle health per limb per second for 25 minutes; consciousness capped at 90 during effect.</color>
propital.name: Propital Regenerative Stimulant [Propital]
propital.desc:
Military drug. Stimulates regenerative processes by increasing biosynthesis of purine and pyrimidine bases, RNA, and functional enzymatic cellular elements. However, it has long-term side effects. Only to be used by qualified physicians and medical personnel. Labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Restores 0.1 skin and muscle health to all limbs per second for 15 minutes; moderate opioid influence.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: +10 sickness; after 3 min, permanent -2 resilience/strength; after 10 min, severe tunnel vision and tremors for 5 minutes.</color>
sj6.name: SJ6 TGLabs Combat Stimulant [SJ6]
sj6.desc:
Combat stimulant. Injected before combat to enhance physical capabilities. Approved for special operations units. Marked with SJ6, labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +20% stamina cap, +120% stamina recovery (for 15 min / 900 sec).</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Immediate +25 sickness; after 10 min, severe tunnel vision and tremors for 5 minutes.</color>
sj1.name: SJ1 Stimulant [SJ1]
sj1.desc:
Combat stimulant. Injected before combat to gain strength and endurance. Can reduce pain sensitivity. Approved for special operations units. Marked with SJ1. Has side effects. Labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +5 strength, +3 resilience, +30% stamina recovery for 5 min; mild opioid influence.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Immediate +10 sickness; drains 0.1 hunger and 0.1 hydration per second during effect.</color>
pnb.name: PNB Stimulant [PNB]
pnb.desc:
Codename PNB. Short-term activation of internal muscles into a hyperosmotic state, reducing physical damage taken. Also increases protein synthesis rate, accelerating tissue recovery. Used at critical moments in combat to boost performance. Special forces only. Has side effects. Labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Repairs and prevents nail damage; restores 0.2 muscle health to all limbs per second for 2 min; +30% stamina recovery, +3 temporary resilience for 5 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: After 5 min, permanent -1 strength; stimulant tremors for 1 min.</color>
obdolbos.name: Obdolbos Cocktail Stimulant [Obdolbos]
obdolbos.desc:
A syringe filled with homemade drugs, crafted by Sanitar, a former TerraGroup Labs employee. His signature is on the label. Each time, the side effects are different. If you have nothing left to lose, you might as well take the risk. This one looks different from the others, not quite right...

<color=#ffcc00>Effect: After a 5-second delay, randomly triggers one of the following:</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>  · 10%: Blood volume +0.1L/s for 30s; all limbs +50 muscle/skin; brain tissue +40; permanent +10 strength/intellect/resilience</color>
<color=#ff6666>  · 15%: Mind wipe</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>  · 15%: Instant +5 hunger/hydration; -2°C body temp for 10 min</color>
<color=#ff6666>  · 15%: Brain tissue health -25</color>
<color=#cc0000>  · 15%: Instant death</color>
<color=#ff6666>  · 15%: -1 hydration and hunger/s, -0.1kg weight, +3°C body temp for 30 sec</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>  · 15%: +80% stamina recovery for 25 min; permanent +3 strength</color>
<color=#ff6666>  · 15%: +10Gy radiation, +30 sickness; permanent +5 intellect</color>
sj9.name: SJ9 TGLabs Body Temp Suppressant [SJ9]
sj9.desc:
Custom-made for special forces personnel. It can lower body temperature in a short time, significantly slowing metabolism. Using SJ9 can significantly reduce heat emitted to the environment while maintaining safe metabolic levels. Used for night operations, making the body nearly invisible to thermal imaging.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Body temperature locked at 31°C for 20 minutes (can be used during hypothermia to maintain minimum body temp).</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Immediate +15 sickness; permanent -2 resilience; after 10 min, continuous chest pain and -0.2 chest muscle/s for 10 min.</color>
blueblood.name: Artificial Blood (Blue Blood) [Blue Blood]
blueblood.desc:
A blood substitute capable of transporting oxygen, used as a super antidote for poisoning and radiation. Invented by Soviet scientists in the 1980s. A submicron emulsion based on PFO mixture. Once injected, it temporarily accelerates metabolism and promotes tissue recovery. Overuse and immune reactions can adversely affect health.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Immediately stops and prevents all bleeding for 2 min (120 sec); immediate -70% toxin; immediate -10Gy radiation.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect (3 min delay): -40% immunity; 33% chance of vomiting; -0.3 hunger/s for 1 min.</color>
xtg12.name: xTG-12 Antidote [xTG-12]
xtg12.desc:
Can neutralize most known toxins used in warfare. Can also be used against some natural toxins. While its components are in the blood, they provide immunity to toxins. It will cause a decline in health.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +70% resistance, -100% toxin, significantly suppresses and reduces systemic infections within 2 min, slightly improves sepsis. Lasts 5 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: 20% chance of vomiting after 3 min; tremors for 1 min after 5 min.</color>
mildronate.name: Mildronate Syringe
mildronate.desc:
A drug developed for athletes, allowing users to recover faster even under more intense training. Can temporarily increase strength, endurance, and recovery speed. However, Mildronate also has an undisclosed property: it can increase the internal tension of muscles, improving the body's resistance to physical impact. This property led the military to use it as a combat stimulant. Has side effects.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Immediate -20% cardiac fibrillation; +10% stamina cap, +50% stamina recovery for 25 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Drains 0.1 hunger and 0.1 hydration per second for 15 min.</color>
2a2btg.name: 2A2-(b-TG) Stimulant [2A2-(b-TG)]
2a2btg.desc:
This product aims to create a drug that provides combat support during reconnaissance or extraction far from supply points. It must also be producible by hand. It can keep the central nervous system stable long-term, help combat personnel adapt to different environments, and improve carrying capacity. Dehydration rate increases when using this product. Labeled 'TerraGroup Labs'.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Carry weight +7u (stacks with other stims) for 20 min; immediate +5 mood.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: -0.1 hydration/s for 15 min.</color>
obdolbos2.name: Obdolbos 2 Cocktail Stimulant [Obdolbos 2]
obdolbos2.desc:
A syringe filled with homemade drugs. This is a brand new version of the old product. It seems Sanitar is really passionate about this.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Immediate permanent +6 strength/resilience/intellect, permanent carry weight +3u.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Immediate -30% stamina recovery, -20% max stamina for 40 min; after 5 min, -0.2 hunger/hydration/s, head/chest muscle -0.3/s for 5 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Warning!: Second injection will NOT stack positive effects!</color>
ibuprofen.name: Ibuprofen Painkiller [Ibuprofen]
ibuprofen.desc:
A non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) used to treat pain, fever, and inflammation.

But... this stuff seems somewhat toxic to you. Better not use it unless necessary.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +50% resistance for 7 min; significantly suppresses and reduces systemic infections within 1 min; pain relief; body temp -2°C; +20% stamina recovery for 7 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Mood -3; chance of vomiting after taking.</color>
<color=#cc0000>Warning: Taking a second dose within 10 minutes triggers overdose reaction; consecutive overdoses after the second WILL be fatal!</color>
grizzlykit.name: Grizzly First Aid Kit
grizzlykit.desc:
The travel Grizzly first aid kit is considered one of the best. It contains everything needed in extreme situations. Even though it looks dusty, the contents are still intact.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Greatly accelerates fracture recovery and hemostasis; moderate skin and muscle health recovery; slight disinfection. High durability but heavy.</color>
afak.name: AFAK Tactical First Aid Kit
afak.desc:
AFAK (Adaptive First Aid Kit), an upgraded version of the IFAK. Compact and equipped with everything a combatant or law enforcement officer needs in emergencies, effectively treating gunshot wounds and open injuries. Looks very premium.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Moderate hemostasis. High durability.</color>
ifak.name: IFAK Tactical First Aid Kit
ifak.desc:
IFAK (Individual First Aid Kit, US Marine Corps) is standard issue for every Marine. The third generation IFAK is the most well-designed and content-rich version.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Moderate hemostasis. Medium durability.</color>
salewa.name: Salewa First Aid Kit
salewa.desc:
A first aid kit containing a thermal blanket, various types of bandage dressings, and medical tools.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect (per use): Moderate hemostasis. Very high durability.</color>
<color=#c3b091>Special: When body temp is below 30°C, the character uses the thermal blanket on the chest, bandage turns khaki, body temp can quickly rise (up to 36°C).</color>
ai2.name: AI-2 Emergency Kit Syringe [AI-2]
ai2.desc:
The AI-2 emergency kit is a standard first aid equipment developed by the Soviet Union for defense organizations, law enforcement, and civil defense agencies. AI-2 was produced in massive quantities to ensure that in the event of WMD conflicts or hazardous chemical accidents, residents in affected areas could receive personal protective medication. Indeed effective against radiation, but side effects are significant. Can't understand what's inside, might as well mix it all together.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect (per 10ml): Radiation -1Gy, opioid influence +0.2, internal bleeding -2.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect (per 10ml): +3 sickness, -10% immunity, -1 hydration and hunger.</color>
goldenstar.name: Golden Star Balm [Golden Star]
goldenstar.desc:
Vietnamese Golden Star balm, refined from camphor, menthol, peppermint, cajeput, and other plants. Apply to philtrum for colds; chest or back for flu; insect bite areas for bites. Looks like a balm, but why does it smell so pungent and unpleasant?

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Disinfects application area for 30 sec, pain relief after slight delay for 15 sec.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Skin health -5; mood -5; moderate consciousness reduction after slight delay for 10 sec.</color>
vaseline.name: Vaseline [Vaseline]
vaseline.desc:
Vaseline, a multi-purpose ointment often useful for its waterproof and lubricating properties. For example, treating minor cuts and burns, as a preservative for perishable items, and as a non-acidic lubricant for gears. You seem to have seen the white coats managing you use this, just in different packaging.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Body dirt -2, skin health +5.</color>
<color=#54ff9f>Special: When used on left/right hand, claw health +10.</color>
libatine.name: Augmentin Antibiotic [Augmentin]
libatine.desc:
Augmentin is a broad-spectrum combination antibiotic used to treat bacterial infections.

But why is there only one pill in here?

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: +80% resistance for 5 min; suppresses and reduces systemic infections within 1 min.</color>
<color=#ff6666>Side effect: Mood -3; chance of vomiting after about 6 min.</color>
multitool.name: Surv12 Field Surgical Kit [Surv12]
multitool.desc:
An advanced surgical kit with more high-quality instruments, allowing treatment of severe injuries in field conditions.
Automatically determines the required surgery type when used on a limb. High durability but slightly heavy.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Removes shrapnel, reduces dislocations, accelerates 90% fracture recovery (causes moderate pain), auto-detection (fracture treatment requires shrapnel and dislocation treatment first).</color>
multitool.alert.no_surgery: No surgery needed for this area
cms.name: CMS Surgical Kit [CMS]
cms.desc:
A small surgical instrument kit for treating gunshot wounds and other severe injuries.
Automatically determines the required surgery type when used on a limb. Moderate durability but lightweight.

<color=#54ff9f>Effect: Removes shrapnel, reduces dislocations, accelerates 50% fracture recovery (causes moderate pain), auto-detection (fracture treatment requires shrapnel and dislocation treatment first).</color>
cms.alert.no_surgery: No surgery needed for this area
mp133.name: MP-133 12-Gauge Pump-Action Shotgun [MP-133]
mp133.desc:
The MP-133 is a tubular magazine pump-action shotgun produced by IzhMekh (Izhevsk Mechanical Plant). Its design evolved from the earlier IZh-81 pump-action shotgun, primarily intended for civilian markets and security personnel.

<color=#4fc3f7>Pellet damage (×8): Creature 40 / Block 30</color>
sks.name: Simonov SKS 7.62x39 Carbine [SKS]
sks.desc:
A semi-automatic carbine designed by legendary firearms designer Sergei Simonov, specifically for 7.62x39mm ammunition. It was the first intermediate-power cartridge weapon officially adopted by the Soviet Union, commonly known abroad as the SKS-45. The SKS not only has massive circulation in CIS countries but also became a popular civilian weapon in Western countries, with various copies and improved versions still in service with military and police forces in multiple countries. This rifle came from Tula Arms Plant reserve stock and entered the market before undergoing civilian weapon standardization procedures, thus retaining its military weapon characteristics.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 150 / Block 100</color>
axmc.name: Accuracy International AXMC .338 LM Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle [AXMC]
axmc.desc:
The AXMC is a bolt-action sniper rifle built by British company Accuracy International, incorporating extensive design experience from previous generations of equipment and refined through combat use. Chambered in .338 Lapua Magnum, it can be quickly converted to fire .300 Winchester Magnum or .308 Winchester ammunition by replacing the barrel, bolt assembly, and magazine well mechanism.

<color=#ffcc00>[Special Effect] This sniper rifle is equipped with a scope. When held in the main hand, it increases view range.</color>
<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 310 / Block 299</color>
dvl10.name: DVL-10 7.62x51 Bolt-Action Sniper Rifle [DVL-10]
dvl10.desc:
The DVL-10 is a rifle that combines lightness, compactness, and sound suppression. It uses military subsonic ammunition with excellent accuracy and range to meet the needs of special operations and combat missions. Equipped with a standard Lobaev folding stock and Lobaev Hummer Barrels stainless steel competition-grade barrel.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 205 / Block 180</color>
akm.name: AKM 7.62x39 Assault Rifle [AKM]
akm.desc:
The AKM 7.62x39mm assault rifle was adopted by the Soviet Army in 1959, replacing the early AK rifles used by ground forces. The main differences from the early AK include improved accuracy, reduced overall weight, new stock, trigger and sear assembly, and a new muzzle brake. These upgrades effectively improved the combat effectiveness of the AKM.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 120 / Block 90</color>
akm_mag.name: AKM 30-Round Magazine
akm_mag.desc: Dedicated 30-round 7.62x39 magazine for the AKM, compatible with 7.62x39 SP ammunition.
axmc_mag.name: AXMC .338 LM Magazine [10-Round]
axmc_mag.desc: AXMC sniper rifle .338 Lapua Magnum 10-round capacity magazine.
dvl10_mag.name: DVL-10 Magazine [10-Round]
dvl10_mag.desc: Standard DVL-10 sniper rifle magazine, suitable for .308 caliber ammunition.
76251bpz.name: 7.62x51mm BPZ FMJ Rifle Round
76251bpz.desc: This ammunition was primarily used for hunting, self-defense, and target shooting at the time. Despite being a civilian cartridge, the BPZ FMJ has remarkable stopping power and penetration capability, capable of easily penetrating low-to-medium tier armor.
76239sp.name: 7.62x39mm SP Rifle Round
76239sp.desc: A 7.62x39 cartridge suitable for shooting training and recreation. This caliber remains popular today.
12g85.name: 12/70 Magnum 8.5mm Buckshot
12g85.desc: 12/70 buckshot for 12-gauge shotguns, loaded with 8 steel pellets of 8.5mm diameter.
338ucw.name: .338 Lapua Magnum UCW Rifle Round
338ucw.desc: .338 Lapua Magnum (8.6x70mm) UCW ammunition, total bullet weight 16.2g, lead core with brass jacket construction. .338 caliber ammunition delivers highly concentrated shot placement at long distances, with outstanding stopping power and lethal effectiveness, making it particularly suitable for hunting large animals. The UCW's streamlined bullet construction maintains good velocity retention and energy, effectively threatening low-to-medium tier armor, but also has a higher probability of ricochet upon impact.
50copper.name: .50 AE Solid Copper
50copper.desc: .50 AE solid copper ammunition. Good thing this cave has copper ore.
45fmj.name: .45 ACP FMJ
45fmj.desc: Military .45 ACP full metal jacket ammunition.
deagle.name: Magnum Research "Desert Eagle" L6 .50 AE Pistol
deagle.desc:
The Desert Eagle L6 is an improved version of the .50 action hunting pistol. This pistol is massive in size and not the best choice for combat, but it is definitely a unique short-barrel weapon. It has become a regular in video games due to its aggressive appearance and huge size. To this day, it remains the most famous pistol in the world. Manufactured by Magnum Research.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 110 / Block 60</color>
deagle_mag.name: Desert Eagle Magazine [7-Round]
deagle_mag.desc: Desert Eagle .50 AE pistol magazine, 7-round capacity.
glock17.name: GLOCK 17 9x19 Pistol
glock17.desc:
The Glock 17 is a pistol designed by the Austrian company Glock in the 21st century for the Austrian military. It is currently widely used in law enforcement, shooting sports, and civilian self-defense. Its impressive combat characteristics and reliability earned it widespread recognition at the time.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 50 / Block 20</color>
glock17_mag.name: GLOCK 17 Magazine [17-Round]
919pso.name: 9x19mm PSO gzh
919pso.desc: 9x19mm Parabellum PSO pistol cartridge, bullet weight 7.5g, bimetal jacket, primarily designed for sport shooting and hunting. Despite the relatively low muzzle velocity, the bullet produces significant expansion upon impact, delivering excellent stopping power and lethality.
m4a1.name: Colt M4A1 5.56x45 Carbine
m4a1.desc:
The Colt M4A1 carbine is an improved version of the previous generation M4 carbine. The receiver top features a Picatinny rail, replacing the integrated carry handle with a detachable one. To remove the burst-only limitation of the original M4, the M4A1 uses the M16A1 lower receiver, enabling full-auto fire. Designed primarily for special forces requirements.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 90 / Block 70</color>
m4a1_mag.name: M4A1 Magazine [30-Round]
55645fmj.name: 5.56x45mm FMJ
55645fmj.desc: .223 Remington (5.56x45mm) Full Metal Jacket (FMJ) ammunition, with a 3.6g (55 grain) lead core bullet, bimetal jacket, and steel case. Designed for hunting, home defense, and sport shooting. Despite its simple construction and modest penetration, FMJ ammunition can still penetrate low-to-medium tier armor.
p90.name: FN P90 5.7x28 SMG
p90.desc:
The FN P90 is a compact personal defense weapon (PDW) designed and manufactured by Belgian company FN Herstal. In the late 20th century, NATO AC225 document publicly required the development of a new generation of personal defense weapons. The P90 was born in response, becoming the world's first PDW. Compact, powerful, and with manageable recoil, it became the preferred self-defense weapon for armored vehicle crews, crew-served weapon operators, and logistics personnel. Special forces and counter-terrorism units worldwide have also procured this SMG.

<color=#4fc3f7>Single-shot damage: Creature 45 / Block 35</color>
p90_mag.name: P90 Magazine [50-Round]
5728sb193.name: 5.7x28mm SB193
5728sb193.desc: 5.7x28mm FN SB193 subsonic cartridge, with a 4g lead core brass-jacketed bullet, brass case. Designed for use with FN57 and P90 suppressors to minimize sound signature, with reduced propellant charge to ensure reliable cycling. Despite low muzzle velocity, it can still effectively threaten low-to-medium tier armor, though its construction results in a higher probability of ricochet.
